# HS Strategic CFO Advisory

HS Strategic CFO Advisory provides CFO-level advisory for Vancouver and BC real estate investors, business owners, founders, and owner-investors making high-stakes financial decisions.

Core topics:
- Real estate investment analysis
- Real estate investment stress testing
- Financing strategy and capital structure
- Market analysis and valuation
- Fractional CFO and strategic CFO advisory
- Investor-ready financials
- Business acquisition and exit advisory

Primary client review:
- Real Estate Investment Stress Test
- URL: https://hsstrategiccfo.com/stress-test

Primary service pages:
- https://hsstrategiccfo.com/real-estate-advisory
- Fractional CFO Vancouver: https://hsstrategiccfo.com/business-growth-cfo
- https://hsstrategiccfo.com/acquisition-exit-advisory
- https://hsstrategiccfo.com/about
- https://hsstrategiccfo.com/books

Audience:
- Vancouver and BC real estate investors
- Chinese-speaking owner-investors
- Owner-led businesses
- Founders preparing for financing
- Buyers and sellers of small and mid-sized businesses

- https://hsstrategiccfo.com/insights/cap-rate-is-not-cash-flow

- https://hsstrategiccfo.com/insights/lender-ready-financial-model
- https://hsstrategiccfo.com/insights/owner-tax-leakage-check

## Books
- You Don't Know the Housing Market but You Should: https://www.amazon.ca/dp/B0G1JYWVHR
- A Guide to Canadian Real Estate Tax Planning: https://www.amazon.ca/dp/B0GX32M2Y8
